name: Doctor's SBI Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under Doctor's SBI Card terms
milestoneBenefits: Renewal fee waiver on annual spends of Rs 2 lakh or more in the preceding year
additionalBenefits: Travel e-gift voucher worth Rs 1,500 as joining benefit, subject to product terms
5 Reward Points per Rs 100 on eligible medical supplies and travel bookings, capped at 7,500 accelerated Reward Points per month
5 Reward Points per Rs 100 on eligible international spends, capped separately at 7,500 accelerated Reward Points per month
5 Reward Points per Rs 100 on all eligible spends on Doctor's Day, subject to product terms
1 Reward Point per Rs 100 on other eligible retail spends
Professional indemnity insurance cover for doctors, subject to policy terms
8 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per year
4 complimentary international lounge visits per year through Priority Pass
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel transactions

salaried: Designed for doctors and medical professionals
selfEmployed: Designed for doctors and medical professionals
